# Napiyo

Napiyo is a Nepal-focused land measurement utility for converting traditional Hill and Terai land units, comparing global units, visualizing area, tracing plot images approximately, and saving calculations locally.

## Supported Nepal land units

- Ropani
- Aana
- Paisa
- Daam
- Bigha
- Kattha
- Dhur

## Global units

- Square feet
- Square meters
- Square yards
- Acres
- Hectares

## Main features

- Instant conversion between Nepal and global land units
- Hill-system breakdown as Ropani-Aana-Paisa-Daam
- Terai-system breakdown as Bigha-Kattha-Dhur
- Approximate map or image calibration
- Polygon tracing for approximate area calculation
- Area visualization
- Local saved calculation history

## Technical summary

- React 18
- TypeScript
- Vite 5
- Browser local storage
- Lucide React icons
- Optional Microlink screenshot extraction

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/Napiyo

## Accuracy disclaimer

Napiyo is an estimation and learning tool. It does not replace certified survey measurements, cadastral maps, land ownership documents, government records, legal advice, or a licensed surveyor. Manual image calibration, polygon tracing, screenshots, and conversion inputs can introduce significant error.
